hero_subtitle: SFTY connects compliance workflows, provider outputs, and audit evidence into your core systems to support institutional trust, role-based governance, and streamlined bank due diligence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Digital asset businesses face operational delays and audit gaps when core compliance systems remain disconnected. This fragmentation complicates evidence tracking, decision logging, and role-based access control needed for institutional trust and regulatory readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects internal business systems with compliance workflows, preserving audit evidence, enforcing role-based access and centralizing case and decision data for streamlined institutional readiness and bank due diligence.
workflow_title: From core systems to audit-ready evidence
workflow_description: SFTY integrates internal business systems with compliance workflows to preserve evidence, record decisions and prepare audit-ready case packages for enterprise review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. The enterprise evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects compliance outputs into audit-ready evidence, decision logs and case workflows that integrate with core systems for clearer institutional control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives regulated VASPs a secure, governed compliance layer with audit-grade evidence, provider orchestration and deployment control for core system integration.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY integrate with core enterprise compliance systems
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY connects provider outputs into compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved during case management
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe role-based access and governance in enterprise deployment
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a provider-neutral compliance control layer connecting fragmented tools into structured workflows, supporting decision records, case management and regulatory rule monitoring for enterprise readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY integrate with core systems?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and other providers into existing compliance stacks via configurable workflows and APIs without disrupting core systems or data flows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages with audit logs and traceability to support defensible compliance and review readiness for regulators and auditors.
faq_4_question: How does SFTY support access governance?
faq_4_answer: SFTY enforces role-based permissions, access controls and detailed audit logs to maintain secure user governance and evidentiary integrity across compliance operations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers by connecting their outputs into connected workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Integrate compliance workflows into core systems
final_description: Review how SFTY aligns provider outputs, audit-ready evidence and governance controls within your enterprise compliance infrastructure.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
